title: Types of data-matching letters
description: We issue data-matching letters when we find a difference between the details you report and data that is reported to us.
keywords: data matching, data-matching, discrepancy, letter, schedule, types, declare income

child_links.title: Data matching business letters
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data-matching letter about your business.

child_links.title: Data matching for income, deductions and offsets
child_links.description: How to deal with a data-matching letter on income reported, deductions claimed or offsets received in your tax return.

child_links.title: Data matching for investment and assets
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data-matching letter about investments and assets you reported in your tax return.

child_links.title: Data matching for Medicare and private health insurance
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data-matching letter about Medicare and private health you reported in your tax return.

child_links.title: Lodgment of your tax return letter
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data matching letter from us asking you to lodge your tax return.

child_links.title: Sale of property
child_links.description: What to do when you get a letter from us about reviewing your property sales and correcting mistakes on your BAS.

child_links.title: Taxable payments annual reporting
child_links.description: Check when to include payments for Taxable payments reporting system (TPRS) services in your tax return.
